title: Agent Immune System Screenflow Chat
style: clean developer-tool screenflow with chat, diff panels, and decision badges

beats.label: Hook
beats.user: My AGENTS.md is huge, contradictory, and every failed session turns into another rule.
beats.agent: Running Agent Immune System. I will audit for prompt bloat, stale rules, duplicated guidance, autoimmunity, and regeneration opportunities.
beats.visual: Chat window opens beside a bloated markdown file. Badge: Prompt bloat detected.

beats.label: Watchlist
beats.user: The agent forgot browser proof once. Should I add a permanent global rule?
beats.agent: Decision: watchlist. One missed browser-proof check is evidence, not permanent memory. Track it for the next 3 visual-review sessions and promote only if it recurs.
beats.visual: Decision ladder highlights Watchlist. Text: Temporary inflammation, not scar tissue.

beats.label: Prune
beats.user: Agents keep asking permission even after I approved the work.
beats.agent: Finding: old incident-specific rules now suppress safe investigation. Recommendation: demote the narrow rules into dormant memory and keep active instructions proportional.
beats.visual: Before panel shows repeated permission rules. After panel shows demotion cards.

beats.label: Regenerate
beats.user: I have five separate git safety rules. They all sound important.
beats.agent: Regeneration candidate. Replace five overlapping rules with one durable principle: before editing, confirm the worktree is safe: correct branch, writable metadata, no unrelated dirty changes, and no active writer collision.
beats.visual: Five rule cards collapse into one principle card. Badge: Regenerate, don't scar.

beats.label: Autoimmune Rule
beats.user: What about: never run commands without asking first?
beats.agent: Autoimmune finding. This blocks safe read-only discovery. Rewrite it: proceed with safe read-only investigation; ask before destructive commands, external writes, credential access, or irreversible actions.
beats.visual: Red rule turns yellow, then green rewrite. Badge: Protection without paralysis.

beats.label: Close
beats.user: So it does not just shorten prompts?
beats.agent: Right. It routes lessons to the smallest useful memory surface: tolerate, watchlist, incident memory, reference antibody, active instruction, pruning, or regeneration. Proposal-first. Human approval before active edits.
beats.visual: Final product card with tagline: Detect prompt bloat. Prevent rule autoimmunity. Regenerate healthier agent instructions.
